name: Ivanti Neurons Platform
summary: The umbrella experience for automation, visibility, operational intelligence, and connected workflows across the Ivanti ecosystem.
mustKnow: Automation, visibility, and user experience improvements
scenarios: Explain how the platform connects ITSM, endpoint, and experience capabilities.
Discuss where operational intelligence helps reduce manual effort.

name: Ivanti Neurons for ITSM
summary: Covers service management functions such as incidents, requests, problems, changes, knowledge, approvals, and workflow-based fulfillment.
mustKnow: Forms, quick actions, workflows, saved searches
scenarios: Build a weekly report for open incidents.
Automate approval or notification flow for service requests.

name: Ivanti Neurons for UEM
summary: Supports unified endpoint management, policy control, software delivery, visibility, and compliance across endpoints.
scenarios: Talk through patching and software distribution approach.
Explain policy-driven control across large endpoint populations.

name: Ivanti Neurons for MDM
summary: Supports mobile device enrollment, policy management, app distribution, and secure device operations.
scenarios: How to roll out a new mobile app to managed devices.

name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager
summary: Handles endpoint administration, inventory, deployment, patching, and operational control for enterprise devices.
scenarios: Explain troubleshooting when a deployment does not reach some devices.

name: Ivanti Velocity
summary: Optimizes mobility workflows for business-critical environments such as warehouses and field operations.
scenarios: Describe a warehouse handheld workflow redesign.
Explain how to reduce friction in repetitive frontline tasks.

name: Integrations and APIs
summary: Includes REST APIs, web service integrations, automation hooks, connectors, and cross-system orchestration patterns.
scenarios: Integrate ITSM with an external approval or reporting system.
Send scheduled results using data from a saved search.
